text.title: Learning Speed as Competitive Moat Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Product is post-PMF AND competitor pressure non-trivial?

conclusion.verdict: pre-PMF or commodity competition; learning-velocity not the moat
continuous-mode: only flag stale beliefs + log decision velocity

text.example: applies=true -> audit_window=true -> run full belief-audit (rule belief-register-written).
